name: Philadelphia Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: In a bowl, combine flour, salt, and butter. Cut the butter into the flour until it forms a crumbly texture. Gradually add ice water, tossing to form a ball. Roll out to fit a 12-inch pie plate. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
2. Bake the crust at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
3. Filling: In a separate bowl, mix the filling ingredients together. Pour into the baked crust.
4. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, then reduce to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 40 minutes.
5. Topping: Sprinkle the walnut mixture over the pie. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
